title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
summary: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

title: Trump delays AI security executive order: ‘I don’t want to get in the way of that leading’
summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in almost half a century
summary: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
summary: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
summary: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
summary: Spotify is releasing new audiobook plans later this year

title: Spotify will reserve tickets for top fans of an artists in a bid to drum up engagement
summary: Spotify said that it will monitor activity like streams and shares to determine who is a top fan

title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani takes to Twitch to chat with New Yorkers
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch series today at 4 p.m. ET.

title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
summary: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
summary: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

title: Maka Kids is redefining kids’ screen time with a streaming app optimized for well-being, not engagement
summary: Maka Kids is building a streaming app for children ages zero to six featuring content designed for healthy development. The startup has now raised $3 million in seed funding to scale its platform.

title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
summary: One of the most promising introductions at Google’s I/O developer conference on Tuesday was a new way for consumers to use the web: AI agents. Unfortunately, it was also the most confusing.

title: Wayve’s self-driving tech is headed to US cars made by Stellantis
summary: Wayve's self-driving tech will show up in Stellantis vehicles in 2028.

title: With aluminum prices up 20%, recycling startups bet on AI to cash in
summary: Recycling startups are using AI to improve the recovery of critical minerals like aluminum, aiming to build a massive source of the metal.

title: Flipper unveils a Linux-powered networking gadget built for hackers and tinkerers
summary: Flipper Devices said that the new gadget is in development and the base model will cost under $350.

title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
summary: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

title: Beauty booking startup Fresha hits $1B valuation with KKR backing
summary: Beauty and wellness booking marketplace Fresha says it has raised $80 million investment from KKR’s Next Generation Technology Growth fund, KKR's growth equity arm.

title: Truecaller gets into the eSIM business to diversify its revenue streams
summary: The company said its plans will range from 1 GB over 7 days to 20 GB over 30 days. Initially, the launch will make the eSIM product available in 29 countries.

title: General Catalyst just led a $63M bet on India’s travel payments market
summary: Scapia, an Indian startup that combines travel booking with co-branded credit cards and mobile payments, said the deal doubles its valuation.

title: Top Gun turns 40
summary: Tony Scott's 1986 blockbuster and the 2022 sequel are the best recruitment tools the US Navy could hope for.
